story.soThat: extension can be loaded và run in browser

task.title: Create manifest.json với Manifest V3 format

subtasks.subtask: Verify format matches Manifest V3 specification
Test manifest loads correctly in Chrome
Add `description`: Brief description of extension functionality
Add `host_permissions` if needed for API calls
Verify permissions are minimal và necessary
Configure `css` if needed for injected styles
Configure background worker to open side panel on action click
Verify side panel opens khi clicking extension icon
Verify icons display correctly in Chrome
Verify content script loads on crypto websites
Verify icons display in extension management page

acceptanceCriteria.ac: Manifest includes: name, version, description, permissions (storage, activeTab, side_panel)
Content script configuration với matches pattern for crypto websites

doc.title: Browser Extension Architecture - ChainLens.so
doc.snippet: Chrome Extension Manifest V3 is required (modern standard, required by Chrome). Background pages replaced by service workers. Content scripts run in isolated world.

doc.title: Browser Extension Architecture - ChainLens.so
doc.snippet: Storage: chrome.storage API. Messaging: chrome.runtime.sendMessage. Background Processing: Service Worker (Manifest V3). Content Script Injection: Vanilla JS hoặc React.

doc.title: ChainLens.so Browser Extension - Epic Breakdown
doc.snippet: As a developer, I want Chrome Extension Manifest V3 configuration, So that extension can be loaded và run in browser. Acceptance criteria include manifest format, permissions (storage, activeTab, side_panel), content script, background worker, side panel, và icons.

doc.title: ChainLens.so Browser Extension - Product Requirements Document
doc.snippet: FR012: Extension phải work trên Chrome, Edge, và Firefox (Manifest V3 compatible). Extension phải support authentication sử dụng Supabase với chrome.storage adapter.

doc.title: Story 10.1: Extension Project Structure Setup
doc.snippet: Previous story established extension directory structure at `extension/` với folders: `src/content-script/`, `src/sidepanel/`, `src/background/`, `src/shared/`. TypeScript config và package.json created.

file.reason: Reference for extension name và version to use in manifest.json. Should match package.json values.
Content script source location. Manifest will reference built output `content-script.js`.
Background service worker source location. Manifest will reference built output `background.js`.
Public assets location. Side panel HTML và extension icons will be placed here.

constraint.description: Must use Manifest V3 (required by Chrome). Background pages replaced by service workers. Content scripts run in isolated world.
Permissions must be minimal và necessary. `storage` for chrome.storage API, `activeTab` for tab interaction, `side_panel` for side panel API. `host_permissions` may be needed for API calls.
Content script should target crypto websites: CoinGecko, Binance, CoinMarketCap. Use wildcard patterns for flexibility.
Manifest references built files (content-script.js, background.js, sidepanel.html). These will be generated by build process in Story 10.3. For now, create placeholder references.
Icons required: 16x16, 48x48, 128x128. Format: PNG recommended. Placeholder icons acceptable for MVP. Location: `extension/public/icons/`.
Manifest V3 is compatible với Chrome, Edge, và Firefox. Ensure manifest follows V3 specification strictly.

interface.name: Content Script Registration
interface.signature: content_scripts: [{ matches: string[], js: string[], run_at: string }]

interface.name: Side Panel Configuration
interface.signature: side_panel: { default_path: string }, action: { default_title: string, default_icon: object }

tests.standards: Testing standards: Load extension in Chrome Developer mode, verify manifest.json parses without errors, verify content script loads on crypto websites, verify background service worker registers, verify side panel opens correctly, verify icons display. Use Chrome extension management page để verify configuration.

test.idea: Load extension in Chrome Developer mode và verify manifest.json parses without errors
Verify manifest includes all required fields: name, version, description, permissions
Check Chrome extension management page shows correct name, version, và description
Visit crypto website (CoinGecko, Binance) và verify content script loads (check DevTools Console)
Verify content script matches pattern works for multiple crypto websites
Check Chrome extension management page shows "Service worker" status for background worker
Verify background service worker registers without errors (check DevTools Service Worker panel)
Click extension icon và verify side panel opens correctly
Verify side panel title displays correctly when hovering over extension icon
Verify side panel persists (doesn't close when clicking outside)
Check extension management page displays icons correctly (16x16, 48x48, 128x128)
Verify icons appear in browser toolbar (if applicable)
